scripts.build: npm run typecheck && turbo run build
scripts.lint: biome check . && npm run typecheck && turbo run lint
scripts.generate:api-client: npm run generate:openapi && turbo run generate:api-client
scripts.check:generated: npm run generate:api-client && git diff --exit-code -- apps/api/openapi/openapi.json packages/api-client/src/generated/openapi.ts
